arts.ttl: Bologna’s Riccardo Orsolini returns to training
arts.sum: There's good news for Bologna as they prepare for their upcoming away match against Torino on Saturday. Captain Riccardo Orsolini has rejoined group training, as confirmed by an official club statement. The post Bologna’s Riccardo Orsolini returns to training appeared first on FootItalia.com.
